1.description: resolve Drammen municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get 200-year flood zones within Drammen municipality extent

3.description: get quick-clay hazard zones within Drammen municipality extent

4.description: get parcels larger than 5000 m² within Drammen municipality extent using spatial intersection with municipality geometry

5.description: find parcels that intersect 200-year flood zones

6.description: calculate distance from each flood-intersecting parcel to the nearest quick-clay hazard zone

7.description: collapse to one row per parcel using MIN(distance_m)

8.description: sort parcels by distance to nearest quick-clay hazard zone ascending, then by teigid ascending for deterministic order

1.description: resolve Drammen municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get 200-year flood zones within Drammen municipality extent

3.description: get quick-clay hazard zones within Drammen municipality extent

4.description: get parcels in Drammen municipality larger than 5000 m² using kommunenummer filter

6.description: calculate distance from each parcel to the nearest quick-clay hazard zone

7.description: collapse to one row per parcel using MIN(distance_m)

8.description: sort parcels by distance to quick-clay hazard zone ascending, then by teigid ascending for tie-breaker
